text:
We are such stuff
As dreams are made on; and our little life
Is rounded with a sleep.

Welcome to the internet
Could I interest you in everything all of the time?
A little bit of everything all of the time?
Apathy's a tragedy, and boredom is a crime
- Bo Burnham

Where I come from, stakeholder management is all about making sure you’ve got your vampire where you want it.
- Charles Stross

Like the famous mad philosopher said, when you stare into the void, the void stares also; 
but if you cast into the void, you get a type conversion error. 
(Which just goes to show Nietzsche wasn't a C++ programmer.).
- Charles Stross

Steampunk is nothing more than what happens when Goths discover brown.
- Charles Stross

The five stages of bureaucratic grieving are: denial, anger, committee meetings, scapegoating, and cover-up.
- Charles Stross

Life begets intelligence, intelligence begets smart matter and a singularity.
- Charles Stross

Programming is a job where Lovecraft meets tradecraft, all the time.
- Charles Stross
If I worry, will the future change?

I've never fell off a big chimney, y'know... You only fall off one of them once
- Fred Dibnah

One mistake up here, and it's half a day out with the undertaker. 
- Fred Dibnah

Did you hear about the tragedy at the genetic research lab? 
They crossed a cheetah with a crab, and well... things went sideways fast.

What do you get if you cross a sheep and a kangaroo?
A stern talking-to from the ethics committee and the revocation of your research grant.
